action.description:
Introduced by Senators Larson, Carpenter, Habush Sinykin, Ratcliff, Roys, Smith, Spreitzer and Wall; 
cosponsored by Representatives Palmeri, Snodgrass, Mayadev, Anderson, Andraca, Clancy, DeSmidt, Fitzgerald, Joers, Madison, Miresse, Moore Omokunde, Prado, Roe, Sinicki, Stroud, Subeck, Tenorio and Udell
